name: Character Sheet
description: Character consistency tracker for AI video production with reference images, trait tags, appearance log, and consistency scoring across generated frames.

card.description: Compact character card with avatar, name, top traits, and small consistency score for list views and sidebars

detail.description: Expanded detail view with large avatar, reference gallery strip, trait chips, consistency ring, and scene appearance log for deep review

grid.description: Grid overview rendering all characters as equal-sized cards for cast overview and selection across a production

visual_brief: A large circular character avatar (120px diameter in detail preset, 64px in card) rendered with 2px ring border and subtle glow. Character name displayed prominently below in semibold 18px type. Trait chips arranged as a wrapping flex row below the name, each chip being a small pill (outfit: denim jacket, hair: dark curly, age: mid-30s, style: cinematic) with category-specific accent colors. Reference gallery shows 4-6 alternate angle images in a horizontal strip of 80x80px rounded squares with hover lift. Appearance log renders as a vertical scrollable list of scene cards, each showing a 48x27px thumbnail, scene number, and timestamp when the character appears. Consistency score is a circular progress ring (80px diameter) with stroke-width 8px, showing percentage numerically in center (e.g. '94%'), color-graded green>80, amber 60-80, red<60. Score indicates how well AI-generated frames match the original reference.

slots.character-avatar: Large circular avatar at the top displaying the primary reference image. 120px diameter with 2px ring border. Optional upload/change affordance on hover.
slots.character-header: Name and role block directly below avatar. Name in large semibold type, role label beneath in muted text.
slots.trait-chips: Wrapping flex row of trait pills grouped by category. Each chip shows category:value format with category-specific accent coloring. Editable: clicking a chip opens inline edit.
slots.reference-gallery: Horizontal strip of 4-6 alternate reference images as rounded 80x80px thumbnails. Add-reference affordance at end of strip. Clicking a thumbnail previews full-size.
slots.consistency-score: Circular progress ring rendering percentage score with color grading. Positioned alongside header in detail preset. Tooltip explains calculation on hover.
slots.appearance-log: Vertical scrollable list of scenes where the character appears. Each row has a small thumbnail, scene number, timestamp, and consistency delta for that specific appearance.

responsive.mobile: Avatar reduces to 80px. Reference gallery becomes horizontal scroll. Appearance log limits to 5 items with 'view all' link. Trait chips wrap freely.
responsive.tablet: Standard detail layout with slightly reduced spacing. Grid preset shows 2 columns.
responsive.desktop: Full detail layout with all sections visible. Grid preset shows 3-4 columns.

transitions.consistency-score-update: stroke-dashoffset lerp 600ms ease-out with number counter

ambient.score-low-warning: pulse red glow 2s ease-in-out infinite when score < 60

composition.CharacterSheet: Root(d-surface, stack) > [CharacterAvatar + CharacterHeader + ConsistencyScore + TraitChip* + ReferenceGallery + AppearanceLog]

keyboard: Tab: cycle through traits and references
Enter: edit selected trait or open reference
